creator: matthias+freebsd+bugzilla@harz.de
text:
After updating form 12.2 to 12.3 im hit by this problem regulary (every 1-2 days).

I Use 

FreeBSD serx05.xenet.de 12.3-STABLE FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE stable/12-n234916-1be600552e5 XENET  amd64

Using epair for connecting VNET/Jails.

tcpdump on both epair ends shows traffic floating from host to jails epair
but no traffic from jail to host.

I can see traffic going out on vnetjails epair but this show not up on hosts epair.
